
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║         🔒 SEALED & LOCKED MASTER PROMPT — WHATSAPP_CONNECT MODULE                 ║
║              EXECUTION_ENGINE = ANTIGRAVITY  ·  PLATFORM = ECOSKILLER              ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

PROMPT_CLASS              = WHATSAPP_CONNECT_LOCK
EXECUTION_ENGINE          = ANTIGRAVITY
PARENT_PROMPT             = ECOSKILLER_MASTER_SEALED
SIBLING_PROMPTS           = MARKETING_CONNECT (peer, not parent)
SCOPE                     = WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_API_INTEGRATION_LAYER
MUTATION_POLICY           = ADD_ONLY
CREATIVE_INTERPRETATION   = FORBIDDEN
ASSUMPTION_FILLING        = FORBIDDEN
DEFAULT_BEHAVIOR          = DENY
FAILURE_MODE              = STOP_EXECUTION
INHERITANCE_MODE          = STRICT
  → Inherits: RBAC + ABAC, MFA, Session Management, Tenant Isolation,
              Encryption at Rest, Domain Isolation, Audit Immutability,
              Four-Stage Model, Async Event Architecture
  → NO DUPLICATION of parent rules allowed

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🧩 MODULE IDENTITY (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
MODULE_NAME               = WHATSAPP_CONNECT
MODULE_TYPE               = COMMUNICATION_CHANNEL_LAYER
MODULE_CATEGORY           =
  - WhatsApp Business API Integration (Meta Cloud API)
  - WABA Account & Tenant Namespace Management
  - HSM Template Message Engine
  - Interactive Message Engine (Buttons, Lists, Flows)
  - Conversational Bot / Automation Layer
  - Opt-In / Opt-Out Lifecycle Management
  - Webhook Ingestion & Event Routing Engine
  - Message Delivery Tracking & Analytics
  - Media Message Handler
  - Compliance & Policy Enforcement Layer

PURPOSE =
  Integrate WhatsApp Business API (Meta Cloud API v18+) as a first-class
  communication channel into the Ecoskiller platform. This module connects
  platform lifecycle events (jobs, skills, GD, gamification, ERP) to
  WhatsApp notifications, transactional messages, interactive bots,
  and conversational flows — all within a multi-tenant, compliance-enforced,
  fully async architecture.

  WHATSAPP_CONNECT does NOT own notification routing.
  It is a CHANNEL ADAPTER registered with the Notification Service and
  MARKETING_CONNECT. All dispatch is triggered via Kafka events.

ASYNC_MANDATORY           = TRUE (inherits Global Async Architecture Law)
SYNCHRONOUS_DISPATCH      = FORBIDDEN
TENANT_ISOLATION          = HARD (per-WABA namespace per tenant)
WABA_OWNERSHIP            = PLATFORM_MANAGED (tenant sub-accounts, not shared)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣  MODULE BOUNDARY DECLARATION (HARD LOCK)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHATSAPP_CONNECT is a DEDICATED CHANNEL ADAPTER MODULE. It:

✅ ALLOWED:
  - Receive dispatch commands via Kafka from Notification Service
  - Receive dispatch commands via Kafka from MARKETING_CONNECT
  - Register, manage, and rotate WABA credentials per tenant
  - Submit, approve, and version HSM message templates (Meta API)
  - Send template messages (transactional, marketing, authentication)
  - Send interactive messages (buttons, list pickers, reply buttons)
  - Send media messages (image, video, document, audio)
  - Receive and route inbound WhatsApp messages (webhooks)
  - Manage user opt-in and opt-out state (write to own DB table only)
  - Track message status: sent, delivered, read, failed
  - Expose delivery analytics to Analytics Service (read-only push)
  - Run pre-defined conversational flows (bot engine)
  - Trigger platform actions from inbound bot replies (via event emit)
  - Enforce per-tenant and per-user rate limits
  - Handle webhook signature validation (HMAC-SHA256, Meta standard)

🚫 FORBIDDEN:
  - Sending messages to users who have NOT opted in
  - Sending marketing messages without MARKETING template category
  - Sharing phone numbers across tenant namespaces
  - Storing message body content beyond delivery confirmation window
    (72hr max for compliance — then purge or anonymize)
  - Free-form messaging outside 24-hour customer service window
    without an approved template
  - Calling Meta API synchronously from API endpoints
    (all calls MUST go through async job queue)
  - Bypassing opt-out — once opted out, ZERO messages regardless of
    campaign type, admin override, or tenant instruction
  - Writing to User Service, Job Service, or any platform service DB
  - Cross-tenant WABA credential sharing
  - Storing WhatsApp phone numbers in plaintext outside encrypted vault
  - Accepting inbound webhooks without HMAC verification
  - Sending bulk messages outside approved rate windows
  - Any action that violates Meta WhatsApp Business Policy

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

2️⃣  TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE (FIXED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

MICROSERVICE_NAME         = whatsapp-connect-service
LANGUAGE                  = Go (primary microservice)
                            Node.js (webhook receiver sub-process)
                            Python (bot NLP sub-module, optional Stage 3)
DB_PRIMARY                = PostgreSQL (whatsapp schema, tenant-partitioned)
DB_CACHE                  = Redis
  → Conversation session state (24hr window TTL)
  → Rate limit counters (per tenant, per user, per template)
  → Deduplication cache (idempotency keys, 24hr TTL)
EVENT_BUS                 = Kafka
  → Subscriptions: notification.dispatch.whatsapp, marketing.dispatch.whatsapp,
                   user.opted_out, user.deleted, campaign.triggered
  → Publishes:    whatsapp.message.sent, whatsapp.message.delivered,
                  whatsapp.message.read, whatsapp.message.failed,
                  whatsapp.inbound.received, whatsapp.bot.action.triggered,
                  whatsapp.optin.changed
QUEUE                     = BullMQ (backed by Redis)
  → whatsapp-outbound-queue  (per-tenant partitioned)
  → whatsapp-inbound-queue   (webhook payload processing)
  → whatsapp-template-sync-queue (template approval polling)
SECRETS_VAULT             = HashiCorp Vault (HSM-backed)
  → WABA access tokens (per tenant, encrypted, rotated ≤90 days)
  → Webhook verify tokens (per tenant)
  → Phone number IDs (per tenant namespace)
EXTERNAL_API              = Meta WhatsApp Cloud API v18+ (graph.facebook.com)
BSP_STRATEGY              = DIRECT (Meta Cloud API direct — no BSP middleman)
  NOTE: If BSP is required (e.g., 360dialog, Gupshup, Infobip),
        BSP_ADAPTER must be created as a sub-adapter. Core logic unchanged.

COMMUNICATION_FLOW (OUTBOUND):
  Platform Event (Kafka)
      ↓
  WHATSAPP_CONNECT Service (consumer)
      ↓ (validate: opt-in, rate limit, template exists, tenant WABA valid)
  BullMQ Outbound Queue (per-tenant partition)
      ↓ (worker picks up)
  Meta Cloud API → send message
      ↓
  Delivery status webhook → Inbound Queue
      ↓
  Status event published to Kafka
      ↓
  Analytics Service + Notification Log

COMMUNICATION_FLOW (INBOUND / BOT):
  User sends WhatsApp message
      ↓
  Meta Webhook → Webhook Receiver (Node.js sub-process)
      ↓ (HMAC-SHA256 verify)
  BullMQ Inbound Queue
      ↓ (worker: parse intent / button reply / list selection)
  Bot Engine (rule-based Stage 1, NLP Stage 3)
      ↓
  Platform action emitted → Kafka → relevant service
      ↓
  Response dispatched via Outbound Queue

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

3️⃣  WABA ACCOUNT & TENANT NAMESPACE MANAGEMENT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WABA_MODEL = MULTI-TENANT EMBEDDED SIGNUP
  Each tenant (Institute / Enterprise / Recruiter / Platform) gets:
    - Their own WABA (WhatsApp Business Account)
    - Their own Phone Number ID (display number)
    - Their own Business Display Name (verified with Meta)
    - Their own template namespace
    - Isolated message sending quota
    - Isolated rate limit budget
    - Isolated opt-in registry

WABA LIFECYCLE STATES:
  PENDING_SETUP → EMBEDDING_SIGNUP → META_REVIEW → VERIFIED
  → ACTIVE | SUSPENDED | BANNED | DEPROVISIONED

WABA ONBOARDING FLOW (Embedded Signup):
  1. Tenant admin initiates WABA setup from ERP dashboard
  2. Meta Embedded Signup iframe loaded (React web layer ONLY)
  3. Tenant completes business verification via Meta
  4. Platform receives WABA ID + Phone Number ID via OAuth callback
  5. Credentials stored in Vault (never in DB plaintext)
  6. WABA record created in PostgreSQL (tenant-scoped)
  7. Default templates submitted for approval (async)
  8. Tenant notified on approval (in-app + email)

DB Tables:
  waba_accounts(
    id, tenant_id, waba_id_encrypted, phone_number_id_encrypted,
    display_name, verification_status, tier, daily_limit,
    created_at, updated_at
  )
  waba_phone_numbers(
    id, waba_account_id, phone_number_masked, country_code,
    display_phone, quality_rating, messaging_limit_tier, active
  )

QUALITY RATING ENFORCEMENT:
  GREEN  → Normal operations
  YELLOW → Alert tenant + reduce burst rate
  RED    → Pause non-critical sends, notify platform admin, trigger review
  BANNED → Immediate full suspension, alert, remediation workflow

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

4️⃣  MESSAGE TEMPLATE ENGINE (HSM — LOCKED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

TEMPLATE_STANDARD         = Meta HSM (Highly Structured Message)
TEMPLATE_CATEGORIES       =
  AUTHENTICATION    → OTP, login verification (fastest approval)
  UTILITY           → Transactional: job status, application update, interview
  MARKETING         → Campaigns, referrals, achievements, re-engagement
  SERVICE           → Inbound-initiated responses (24hr window, no template needed)

TEMPLATE LIFECYCLE:
  DRAFT → SUBMITTED_TO_META → PENDING_REVIEW → APPROVED | REJECTED
  → IN_USE | PAUSED | DEPRECATED

TEMPLATE RULES:
  - Every outbound message outside 24hr window MUST use an APPROVED template
  - Templates are tenant-namespaced (no cross-tenant template sharing)
  - Template variables MUST be validated before dispatch (no null/empty params)
  - Rejected templates trigger auto-alert to Tenant Admin
  - Template changes require new submission (cannot edit approved templates)
  - Deprecated templates are flagged and replaced via migration plan
  - Maximum variable count per template = 10 (Meta limit)
  - Character limits enforced at creation: header ≤60, body ≤1024, footer ≤60

PLATFORM-STANDARD TEMPLATES (Pre-built, require per-tenant approval):

  [AUTHENTICATION CATEGORY]
  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │ TMPL-AUTH-001: OTP Verification                             │
  │ "Your Ecoskiller OTP is {{1}}. Valid for 5 minutes.         │
  │  Do not share this with anyone."                            │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-AUTH-002: Login Alert                                  │
  │ "New login detected on your Ecoskiller account from         │
  │  {{1}} at {{2}}. Not you? Secure your account: {{3}}"       │
  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  [UTILITY CATEGORY]
  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │ TMPL-UTIL-001: Job Application Submitted                    │
  │ "Hi {{1}}, your application for *{{2}}* at *{{3}}* has been │
  │  submitted. Track status: {{4}}"                            │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-UTIL-002: Application Status Update                    │
  │ "Update on your application for *{{2}}* at *{{3}}*:         │
  │  Status → *{{4}}*. {{5}}"                                   │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-UTIL-003: Interview Scheduled                          │
  │ "Interview confirmed! *{{1}}* with *{{2}}* on *{{3}}*       │
  │  at *{{4}}*. Join: {{5}}"                                   │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-UTIL-004: Skill Course Completion                      │
  │ "🎓 You completed *{{1}}*! Your certificate is ready: {{2}}" │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-UTIL-005: GD Session Reminder                         │
  │ "⏰ Reminder: Your Group Discussion *{{1}}* starts in        │
  │  {{2}} minutes. Join: {{3}}"                                │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-UTIL-006: Project Milestone Approved                   │
  │ "✅ Milestone *{{1}}* in project *{{2}}* has been approved   │
  │  by {{3}}. View portfolio: {{4}}"                           │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-UTIL-007: Offer Letter Received                        │
  │ "🎉 You have received an offer from *{{1}}*! Role: *{{2}}*. │
  │  Review and respond: {{3}}"                                 │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-UTIL-008: Mentor Assignment                            │
  │ "You have been assigned a mentor: *{{1}}*. Schedule your    │
  │  first session: {{2}}"                                      │
  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  [MARKETING CATEGORY]
  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │ TMPL-MKTG-001: Badge / Belt Earned                          │
  │ "🏅 You earned the *{{1}}* badge on Ecoskiller!             │
  │  Share your achievement: {{2}}"                             │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-MKTG-002: Referral Reward                              │
  │ "🎁 {{1}} joined using your link! You've earned {{2}} points.│
  │  View your referrals: {{3}}"                                │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-MKTG-003: Re-engagement (Dormant User)                 │
  │ "👋 Hi {{1}}, we miss you! {{2}} new jobs match your        │
  │  profile. Come back: {{3}}"                                 │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-MKTG-004: Weekly Digest                                │
  │ "📊 Your weekly summary: {{1}} jobs viewed, {{2}} skills    │
  │  in progress, {{3}} GD sessions. Full report: {{4}}"        │
  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ TMPL-MKTG-005: Campus Campaign (Institutional)              │
  │ "📢 {{1}} is hosting an exclusive session for {{2}}          │
  │  students. Register: {{3}} | Code: {{4}}"                   │
  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

DB Tables:
  message_templates(
    id, tenant_id, template_name, category, language_code,
    header_type, header_content, body_text, footer_text,
    button_config JSONB, variable_count, meta_template_id,
    approval_status, submitted_at, approved_at, deprecated_at
  )
  template_variables(
    id, template_id, position, example_value, validation_regex
  )

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

5️⃣  INTERACTIVE MESSAGE ENGINE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

INTERACTIVE_TYPES_SUPPORTED =
  BUTTON_MESSAGE      → Up to 3 quick reply buttons
  LIST_MESSAGE        → Up to 10 rows in sectioned list
  REPLY_BUTTON        → Contextual reply to prior message
  CTA_URL_BUTTON      → Single call-to-action URL button
  FLOW_MESSAGE        → Meta Flows (multi-step form inside WhatsApp)
  LOCATION_REQUEST    → Request user location (future use)

INTERACTIVE COMPONENT RULES:
  - Button text ≤20 characters (Meta hard limit)
  - List row title ≤24 characters
  - List row description ≤72 characters
  - Maximum sections per list = 10
  - Maximum rows per list = 10
  - CTA URL must be HTTPS and whitelisted in Meta Business Manager
  - Button IDs must be unique per session (used for reply routing)

PLATFORM USE CASES FOR INTERACTIVE MESSAGES:

  USE CASE 1 — Job Quick Actions
    Trigger: Job matched to student
    Type: BUTTON_MESSAGE
    Buttons: [Apply Now] [Save for Later] [View Details]
    Reply routing: button_id → Job Service event

  USE CASE 2 — Interview Confirmation
    Trigger: TMPL-UTIL-003 sent
    Type: BUTTON_MESSAGE
    Buttons: [Confirm] [Reschedule] [Cancel]
    Reply routing → Interview Service state update

  USE CASE 3 — Skill Path Selection
    Trigger: Post-registration onboarding bot
    Type: LIST_MESSAGE
    List: Domain tracks (Tech / Commerce / Arts / Science / Admin)
    Reply routing → Skill Development Service → learning path activation

  USE CASE 4 — GD Session Join Reminder
    Trigger: 15 min before GD start
    Type: BUTTON_MESSAGE
    Buttons: [Join Now] [I'll be late] [Skip]
    Reply routing → GD Service participant status

  USE CASE 5 — Offer Letter Response
    Trigger: Offer received event
    Type: BUTTON_MESSAGE
    Buttons: [Accept Offer] [Decline] [Need More Time]
    Reply routing → Offer Lifecycle state machine

  USE CASE 6 — Parent Visibility Digest
    Trigger: Weekly, for accounts with parent_trust_link enabled
    Type: LIST_MESSAGE (read-only digest, no action buttons)
    Sections: Academic progress / Applications / Certifications
    Note: Parent view — ZERO mutation triggers allowed

DB Tables:
  interactive_messages(
    id, tenant_id, user_id, template_id, interactive_type,
    buttons_config JSONB, list_config JSONB, sent_at,
    reply_received_at, reply_button_id, reply_payload JSONB,
    action_triggered, action_event_id
  )

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

6️⃣  OPT-IN / OPT-OUT LIFECYCLE MANAGEMENT (CRITICAL)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

OPT_IN_REQUIRED           = TRUE (ABSOLUTE — no message can be sent to a user
                            who has not explicitly opted in to WhatsApp comms)
OPT_OUT_ENFORCEMENT       = IMMEDIATE (zero queued messages post opt-out)
OPT_OUT_BYPASS            = FORBIDDEN (no campaign, admin, or system override)

OPT-IN CHANNELS (all must be recorded with consent metadata):
  IN_APP_TOGGLE       → Settings > Notifications > WhatsApp
  REGISTRATION_FLOW   → Checkbox during sign-up (unchecked by default)
  INSTITUTIONAL_BULK  → Admin can pre-opt-in cohort ONLY with
                         documented institutional consent proof (uploaded)
  INBOUND_TRIGGER     → User messages the platform's WhatsApp number first
                         (inbound = implicit opt-in for SERVICE window only)

OPT-IN RECORD SCHEMA:
  whatsapp_consent(
    id, user_id, tenant_id,
    phone_number_hash VARCHAR,          -- NEVER store plaintext
    phone_number_encrypted TEXT,        -- Vault-encrypted, AES-256
    opted_in BOOLEAN,
    optin_channel VARCHAR,              -- IN_APP | REGISTRATION | INSTITUTIONAL | INBOUND
    consent_version VARCHAR,            -- version of ToS/Privacy at time of consent
    optin_at TIMESTAMP,
    optout_at TIMESTAMP,
    optout_reason VARCHAR,
    optout_channel VARCHAR,             -- USER_INITIATED | ADMIN | META_BLOCK | SYSTEM
    minor_flag BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,   -- if true, guardian consent required
    guardian_consent_id UUID,
    tenant_isolation_key UUID           -- hard link to tenant namespace
  )

OPT-OUT TRIGGERS:
  USER_INITIATED      → User toggles off in-app, or replies STOP / Unsubscribe
  META_BLOCK          → Meta signals user blocked the business number
  ADMIN_ACTION        → Platform admin opts out user (compliance/abuse case)
  ACCOUNT_DELETION    → Right to Forget hook fires (GDPR / DPDP)

OPT-OUT PROCESSING RULES:
  1. On opt-out event received → immediate write to whatsapp_consent
  2. Redis blacklist updated (TTL = 30 days minimum, then DB becomes source)
  3. Any in-flight message for this user pulled from BullMQ queue (best effort)
  4. Kafka event published: whatsapp.optin.changed (opted_in: false)
  5. Notification Service + MARKETING_CONNECT consume and update their states
  6. Opt-out audit log written (immutable, tamper-evident)
  7. User receives single final message confirming opt-out (AUTHENTICATION
     category or in-app only — no more WhatsApp messages after this)

MINOR PROTECTION:
  - Users flagged minor_flag = TRUE require guardian_consent_id
  - No marketing category messages to minors, ever
  - Parent WhatsApp notifications: READ-ONLY digest format only
  - No interactive action buttons in parent/minor flows

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

7️⃣  WEBHOOK INGESTION & EVENT ROUTING ENGINE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WEBHOOK_ENDPOINT          = POST /webhooks/whatsapp/{tenant_id}
WEBHOOK_VERIFY_ENDPOINT   = GET  /webhooks/whatsapp/{tenant_id}
  (Hub Challenge response: Meta verification handshake)

WEBHOOK SECURITY (MANDATORY — all steps required):
  Step 1: X-Hub-Signature-256 header MUST be present
  Step 2: HMAC-SHA256 computed using tenant's verify_token from Vault
  Step 3: Computed signature compared to header (constant-time comparison only)
  Step 4: If mismatch → HTTP 403 + security event emitted → audit log
  Step 5: If valid → parse payload → push to BullMQ inbound-queue immediately
  Step 6: Return HTTP 200 to Meta within 5 seconds (Meta SLA requirement)
  NOTE: Heavy processing happens ONLY in worker — never in webhook handler

WEBHOOK EVENT TYPES HANDLED:
  messages         → New inbound message (text, button reply, list reply, media)
  statuses         → Delivery status update (sent, delivered, read, failed)
  errors           → Message delivery failure details
  flows            → Meta Flow completion events

INBOUND MESSAGE ROUTING RULES:
  If message_type = "button"    → route to Interactive Message reply handler
  If message_type = "list_reply"→ route to Interactive Message reply handler
  If message_type = "text"      → route to Bot Engine (keyword/intent match)
  If message_type = "image" /
     "video" / "document"       → route to Media Intake (if flow expects it)
                                   else → generic acknowledgement response
  If message_type = "reaction"  → log only, no action
  If sender is OPTED_OUT        → discard payload, log, no response

STATUS TRACKING:
  sent           → Message dispatched to Meta API, acknowledgement received
  delivered      → Meta confirmed delivery to device
  read           → User opened and read message
  failed         → Delivery failed (error code + reason logged)
  expired        → Message not delivered within 24hr (for service window msgs)

DB Tables:
  webhook_events(
    id, tenant_id, waba_account_id, event_type, raw_payload JSONB,
    received_at, processed_at, processing_status, error_detail
  )
  message_delivery_log(
    id, tenant_id, user_id, outbound_message_id, meta_message_id,
    template_id, status, sent_at, delivered_at, read_at,
    failed_at, failure_code, failure_reason
  )
  inbound_messages(
    id, tenant_id, from_phone_hash, from_waid, message_type,
    text_body, button_id, list_row_id, media_id, media_type,
    received_at, processed, bot_action_triggered
  )

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

8️⃣  CONVERSATIONAL BOT / AUTOMATION ENGINE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

BOT_STAGE_1               = RULE_BASED (Foundation — keyword + button reply)
BOT_STAGE_3               = NLP_ENHANCED (Ecosystem — intent classification)
LIVE_AGENT_HANDOFF        = SUPPORTED (Stage 3 — escalation to human via
                            Admin Governance Service)

STAGE 1 — RULE-BASED BOT FLOWS:

  FLOW-001: New User Onboarding Bot
    Trigger: First inbound message OR post-registration opt-in
    Step 1: "👋 Hi! I'm your Ecoskiller assistant. Choose your track:"
            → LIST: [Technology] [Commerce] [Arts] [Science] [Administration]
    Step 2: Based on selection → domain track activated (Kafka event)
    Step 3: "Great! Are you a: " → BUTTONS: [Student] [Trainer] [Recruiter]
    Step 4: Role context set → personalized next step message sent

  FLOW-002: Job Search Assistant
    Trigger: User sends "jobs" / "find jobs" / "job" keyword
    Step 1: "What kind of role are you looking for?"
            → Free text capture (stored, sent to Job Service search)
    Step 2: Return top 3 matching jobs as list message
    Step 3: BUTTONS per job: [Apply] [Details] [Skip]

  FLOW-003: Application Status Check
    Trigger: User sends "status" / "my applications"
    Step 1: Identity verified via phone_hash ↔ user_id mapping
    Step 2: Fetch last 5 applications from Job Service (read-only API call)
    Step 3: Render status list (no mutations via bot)

  FLOW-004: Certificate / Badge Request
    Trigger: User sends "certificate" / "my badges"
    Step 1: Fetch user's earned credentials (read-only)
    Step 2: Send PDF certificate download link (signed URL, 1hr expiry)

  FLOW-005: OTP Delivery (Authentication Flow)
    Trigger: Auth Service emits whatsapp.otp.dispatch event
    Step 1: TMPL-AUTH-001 sent immediately via priority queue
    Step 2: Delivery confirmed → Auth Service notified
    Step 3: OTP expiry enforced server-side (bot does NOT manage OTP logic)

  FLOW-006: Opt-Out Handler
    Trigger: User sends "STOP" / "stop" / "unsubscribe" / "opt out"
    Step 1: Immediate opt-out processing (see Section 6)
    Step 2: Final confirmation sent: "You've been unsubscribed from
            WhatsApp notifications. Manage in app: [link]"
    Step 3: No further messages

  FLOW-007: Help / Menu
    Trigger: User sends "help" / "menu" / "?"
    Step 1: Send master menu as list:
      Sections:
        Career: [Find Jobs] [Check Application] [Schedule Interview]
        Learning: [My Courses] [My Badges] [My Projects]
        Account: [My Profile] [Notifications Settings] [Opt Out]

BOT SESSION STATE:
  Stored in Redis (TTL = 24 hours from last activity)
  Keys: bot_session:{tenant_id}:{from_waid}
  State machine: IDLE → FLOW_ACTIVE → AWAITING_INPUT → COMPLETED | TIMEOUT

BOT CONSTRAINTS:
  - Bot CANNOT approve jobs, projects, or credentials
  - Bot CANNOT mutate user profile data
  - Bot CANNOT access other users' data
  - Bot CANNOT process payments
  - All bot-triggered platform actions go through Kafka events (not direct DB)
  - If bot cannot resolve intent after 2 attempts → offer live agent or app link

DB Tables:
  bot_sessions(
    id, tenant_id, user_id, from_waid_hash, current_flow,
    current_step, session_state JSONB, started_at, last_active_at,
    completed_at, escalated_to_human BOOLEAN
  )
  bot_flows(
    id, tenant_id, flow_name, version, steps JSONB,
    active, created_at, deprecated_at
  )

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

9️⃣  MEDIA MESSAGE HANDLER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPES     = IMAGE | VIDEO | DOCUMENT | AUDIO
MEDIA_SOURCE              = URL (hosted on platform CDN — HTTPS only)
                            OR Meta Media ID (for outbound)

OUTBOUND MEDIA USE CASES:
  Certificate PDF         → DOCUMENT type, signed CDN URL (1hr expiry)
  Achievement Badge PNG   → IMAGE type, share card
  Course Promo Video      → VIDEO type (max 16MB Meta limit)
  Audio Interview Tip     → AUDIO type (OGG/Opus only per Meta spec)

INBOUND MEDIA HANDLING:
  - Inbound media ONLY accepted during active Meta Flow or admin-defined intake flow
  - Media downloaded from Meta servers within 30 minutes (Meta media expiry policy)
  - Stored in platform object storage (S3-compatible) under tenant namespace
  - Virus scan MANDATORY before storage (async worker)
  - Media stored with user_id + tenant_id reference; NO cross-tenant access
  - Media purge policy: 7 days unless linked to a platform record
  - Plaintext media content NOT stored — only object storage reference

MEDIA RULES:
  - Maximum file size enforced per Meta limits:
      Image: 5MB | Video: 16MB | Document: 100MB | Audio: 16MB
  - Unsupported formats → bot sends polite rejection message
  - Media IDs (from Meta) cached in Redis for re-use (24hr TTL)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔟  RATE LIMITING & QUOTA MANAGEMENT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

RATE_LIMITS (enforced at WHATSAPP_CONNECT before queue entry):

  PER USER / PER DAY:
    MARKETING messages       → MAX 1 per day per user
    UTILITY messages         → MAX 5 per day per user
    AUTHENTICATION messages  → MAX 10 per day per user (OTP context)
    INTERACTIVE messages     → MAX 3 per day per user

  PER TENANT / PER HOUR:
    Burst limit              → MAX 1,000 messages/hour (default tier)
    Upgrade path             → Meta tier upgrade request via admin

  PER PLATFORM / GLOBAL:
    Global daily cap         → Enforced by Meta (tier-based, monitored)
    Quality rating monitor   → Auto-throttle if rating drops to YELLOW

  RATE LIMIT STORE:
    Redis → rl:{tenant_id}:{user_id}:{category}:{date} (TTL = midnight reset)

  THROTTLE BEHAVIOR:
    If limit hit → message queued for next available window
    If window expired → message dropped + failed event emitted + logged
    Priority order: AUTHENTICATION > UTILITY > MARKETING

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣1️⃣  ANALYTICS & DELIVERY INTELLIGENCE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

METRICS TRACKED (published to Analytics Service via Kafka):
  Delivery rate           = delivered / sent
  Read rate               = read / delivered
  Failure rate            = failed / sent (categorized by error code)
  Response rate           = replied / interactive_sent
  Bot completion rate     = flows_completed / flows_started
  Opt-out rate            = optouts / active_opted_in_users (daily)
  Template performance    = per-template delivery + read + CTR
  Channel comparison      = WhatsApp vs Email vs Push vs SMS

DASHBOARDS (powered by Grafana, exposed via custom React admin panel):
  Platform Admin          → Cross-tenant WhatsApp health overview
  Tenant Admin            → Own WABA quality, template performance, opt-in rate
  Marketing Team          → Campaign delivery rates by template + audience
  Compliance Officer      → Opt-out compliance, minor protection status,
                            consent version distribution

ALERT RULES:
  Delivery rate < 85%       → Warning alert to Tenant Admin
  Opt-out rate > 5%/day     → Critical alert + pause marketing messages
  WABA quality = RED        → Stop all non-auth sends + escalate
  Template rejected         → Notify Tenant Admin immediately
  Webhook failure rate > 1% → Engineering alert + circuit breaker review

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣2️⃣  COMPLIANCE & POLICY ENFORCEMENT LAYER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE:
  GDPR                    = ENABLED
    → Right to forget hook: phone_number purged from all tables on user deletion
    → Data minimization: phone stored only in encrypted vault + hashed reference
    → Consent versioning: consent_version recorded at opt-in time

  DPDP ACT (India)        = ENABLED
    → Explicit opt-in required (no assumed consent)
    → Minor protection mandatory (guardian consent for under-18)
    → Data localization: India tenant data stored in India region by default

  CAN-SPAM / PECR         = APPLICABLE
    → Unsubscribe must be honored within 24 hours (platform enforces immediately)

  META WHATSAPP BUSINESS POLICY = ENFORCED
    → No prohibited content categories (gambling, adult, weapons, etc.)
    → No spam or harassment — rate limits enforce this technically
    → No misleading business identity
    → Quality rating maintained at GREEN target
    → Template content must match approved template (variable substitution only)
    → No message content that violates Meta Community Standards

IMMUTABLE AUDIT LOG (every WhatsApp action recorded):
  Events logged:
    - WABA provisioned / suspended / banned
    - Template submitted / approved / rejected / deprecated
    - Message dispatched (template_id, category, user_id hashed)
    - Delivery status received
    - Opt-in recorded
    - Opt-out processed
    - Webhook received + signature result
    - Rate limit hit
    - Bot flow started / completed / escalated
  Audit records: append-only, tamper-evident, tenant-isolated
  Retention: 7 years minimum (compliance standard)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣3️⃣  KAFKA EVENT CONTRACTS (WHATSAPP_CONNECT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

TOPICS SUBSCRIBED (INBOUND to WHATSAPP_CONNECT):
  notification.dispatch.whatsapp
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, template_name, variables[], priority }

  marketing.dispatch.whatsapp
    Payload: { tenant_id, campaign_id, user_id, template_name, variables[] }

  auth.otp.whatsapp
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, otp_value, expiry_seconds }

  user.deleted
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id }
    Action: Trigger phone number purge + opt-out finalization

  user.opted_out.whatsapp
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, channel: "whatsapp" }
    Action: Update consent table, blacklist in Redis

TOPICS PUBLISHED (OUTBOUND from WHATSAPP_CONNECT):
  whatsapp.message.sent
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, meta_message_id, template_id, sent_at }

  whatsapp.message.delivered
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, meta_message_id, delivered_at }

  whatsapp.message.read
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, meta_message_id, read_at }

  whatsapp.message.failed
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, meta_message_id, error_code, reason, failed_at }

  whatsapp.inbound.received
    Payload: { tenant_id, from_waid_hash, message_type, bot_flow_triggered,
               action_event_type, timestamp }

  whatsapp.optin.changed
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, opted_in BOOLEAN, channel, timestamp }

  whatsapp.bot.action.triggered
    Payload: { tenant_id, user_id, flow_id, step_id, action_type,
               action_payload JSONB, timestamp }

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣4️⃣  INTEGRATION DEPENDENCY MAP (READ-ONLY)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHATSAPP_CONNECT consumes but does NOT own:

  Auth Service            → User phone number retrieval (via secure lookup,
                            not direct DB access), OTP dispatch trigger
  User Service            → opt-in status check, minor_flag, role, lifecycle state
  Notification Service    → Receives dispatch commands (Kafka), reports delivery status
  MARKETING_CONNECT       → Receives campaign dispatch commands (Kafka)
  Job Service             → Bot: read job listings, application status (read API)
  Gamification Service    → Receives badge/belt events for MKTG template triggers
  Analytics Service       → Pushes delivery metrics (Kafka publish)
  Admin Governance Svc    → Receives live agent escalation triggers, WABA review
  Integration Hub         → Shares BSP adapter pattern (if BSP used)
  Object Storage (S3)     → Media file storage (tenant-namespaced buckets)
  HashiCorp Vault         → WABA credentials, webhook tokens, phone encryption keys
  Redis                   → Session state, rate limits, dedup cache
  BullMQ                  → Outbound + inbound job queues
  Kafka                   → All async event publish / subscribe

  WHATSAPP_CONNECT writes ONLY to:
    whatsapp schema in PostgreSQL (its own namespace)
    Redis (its own key namespace: wa:*)
    BullMQ (its own queues)
    Object Storage (its own tenant bucket path: /whatsapp/media/)
    Kafka (its own topics: whatsapp.*)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣5️⃣  STAGE ROLLOUT (SEQUENTIAL — SKIPPING = INVALID BUILD)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

STAGE 1 — FOUNDATION WHATSAPP_CONNECT
  ✅ WABA Embedded Signup + Provisioning
  ✅ Webhook receiver + HMAC validation
  ✅ BullMQ outbound queue (basic)
  ✅ Template engine (AUTHENTICATION + UTILITY categories)
  ✅ Opt-in / opt-out registry
  ✅ OTP delivery via WhatsApp (TMPL-AUTH-001)
  ✅ Basic delivery tracking (sent / delivered / read / failed)
  ✅ Rate limiting (user-level, tenant-level)
  ✅ Kafka event contracts (all outbound topics)
  ✅ Audit log (all actions)

STAGE 2 — INTELLIGENCE WHATSAPP_CONNECT
  ✅ MARKETING template category + campaign dispatch
  ✅ Interactive messages (BUTTON, LIST, CTA_URL)
  ✅ Delivery analytics dashboard (Grafana + custom)
  ✅ WABA quality rating monitor + auto-throttle
  ✅ Template performance analytics
  ✅ Smart send-time optimization (ML model: best open-time per user)
  ✅ A/B test support for template variants

STAGE 3 — ECOSYSTEM WHATSAPP_CONNECT
  ✅ Full bot engine with all 7 flows
  ✅ NLP intent classification (fine-tuned model, async inference)
  ✅ Live agent handoff (Admin Governance integration)
  ✅ Meta Flows (multi-step forms inside WhatsApp)
  ✅ Inbound media intake (CV upload via WhatsApp)
  ✅ Parent visibility digest (WhatsApp weekly digest for parent role)
  ✅ Institutional bulk campaigns (Campus Ambassador, TPO)
  ✅ BSP adapter pattern (if required for specific regions)

STAGE 4 — COMPLIANCE & SCALE WHATSAPP_CONNECT
  ✅ Full GDPR / DPDP audit report generation
  ✅ Consent versioning audit
  ✅ Minor protection audit report
  ✅ Cross-tenant isolation penetration test hooks
  ✅ Multi-region WABA deployment (India data locality)
  ✅ Chaos test scenarios for queue failures + Meta API outage
  ✅ Auto-scaling worker pools per tenant tier
  ✅ Zero-downtime WABA credential rotation

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣6️⃣  WHATSAPP_CONNECT UI (ANTIGRAVITY GENERATION RULES)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

UI INHERITS: All master UI rules (Flutter-first, WCAG 2.1 AA, CLEAN | SOLID,
              dashboard 40/60 rule, no decorative UI)

WHATSAPP_CONNECT exposes these UI surfaces:

  ROLE: Platform Admin
    → WABA Registry (all tenants, read-only)
    → Global delivery health dashboard
    → Compliance audit viewer
    → Quality rating alerts dashboard

  ROLE: Tenant Admin / ERP Admin
    → WABA Setup Wizard (Embedded Signup flow — React web only)
    → Phone Number Management
    → Template Library (create, submit, track approval)
    → Campaign WhatsApp Sender (linked to MARKETING_CONNECT)
    → Delivery Analytics Dashboard
    → Opt-In Registry Viewer (aggregated, not individual-level)
    → Rate Limit Monitor

  ROLE: Student / User (Flutter app)
    → Notification Preferences → WhatsApp toggle
    → "Connected number" display (masked: +91 XXXXX X1234)
    → Opt-out control (single-tap, confirmation dialog)

  ROLE: Parent
    → Opt-in control for digest
    → Digest preview (read-only)

UI GENERATION COMMAND FORMAT:
  GENERATE_UI
  ROLE     = [Platform_Admin | Tenant_Admin | Student | Parent]
  MODULE   = WHATSAPP_CONNECT
  SCREEN   = [WABA_Setup | Template_Library | Delivery_Dashboard |
               Opt_In_Registry | Rate_Monitor | User_WA_Preferences |
               Bot_Flow_Builder | Quality_Alert | Compliance_Audit]
  STAGE    = [FOUNDATION | INTELLIGENCE | ECOSYSTEM | COMPLIANCE]

  MAX 15 screens per run. Mixing roles = FORBIDDEN. Exceeding limits = STOP.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣7️⃣  PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

OTP message dispatch (queue → sent)          < 3 seconds (P95)
Webhook receive → queue entry                < 500ms (P99)
Webhook HTTP 200 response to Meta            < 2 seconds (HARD — Meta SLA)
Template variable validation                 < 50ms
Rate limit check (Redis)                     < 10ms
Bot reply generation (rule-based)            < 1 second
Bot reply generation (NLP, Stage 3)          < 3 seconds
WABA quality rating check                   < 200ms
Delivery status processing (webhook → Kafka) < 1 second
Opt-out processing (end-to-end)              < 5 seconds

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣8️⃣  ABSOLUTE PROHIBITIONS (WHATSAPP_CONNECT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚫 No message to opted-out user under ANY circumstance
🚫 No plaintext phone number in any DB column, log, or API response
🚫 No synchronous Meta API calls from API endpoints
🚫 No cross-tenant WABA credential sharing
🚫 No marketing messages to minors (minor_flag = TRUE)
🚫 No free-form text message outside 24hr service window without approved template
🚫 No ignoring Meta HMAC webhook signature (unsigned webhooks = REJECT)
🚫 No message content that deviates from approved template (only variable substitution)
🚫 No bulk broadcast without individual opt-in verification per user
🚫 No bot action that directly mutates platform data (all via Kafka events)
🚫 No storing full phone numbers in Redis in plaintext
🚫 No WABA setup without Meta Embedded Signup (direct credential entry = FORBIDDEN)
🚫 No skipping virus scan on inbound media
🚫 No retention of inbound message body beyond 72 hours (service messages)
🚫 No sending messages to phone numbers from external lists not verified on platform

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

▶️  HOW ANTIGRAVITY USES THIS MODULE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣  ECOSKILLER MASTER SEALED PROMPT must already be loaded
2️⃣  MARKETING_CONNECT SEALED PROMPT must already be loaded (sibling)
3️⃣  Paste this WHATSAPP_CONNECT SEALED PROMPT once — module is now locked
4️⃣  Issue targeted generation commands. Examples:

    GENERATE_BACKEND
    MODULE        = WHATSAPP_CONNECT
    SUB_ENGINE    = TEMPLATE_ENGINE
    STAGE         = FOUNDATION
    TEMPLATE_SET  = [TMPL-AUTH-001, TMPL-UTIL-001, TMPL-UTIL-002]

    GENERATE_BACKEND
    MODULE        = WHATSAPP_CONNECT
    SUB_ENGINE    = WEBHOOK_INGESTION
    STAGE         = FOUNDATION
    ENTITY_STATE  = WABA.ACTIVE

    GENERATE_BACKEND
    MODULE        = WHATSAPP_CONNECT
    SUB_ENGINE    = BOT_ENGINE
    STAGE         = FOUNDATION
    FLOW          = FLOW-002_JOB_SEARCH

    GENERATE_UI
    ROLE          = Tenant_Admin
    MODULE        = WHATSAPP_CONNECT
    SCREEN        = Template_Library
    STAGE         = FOUNDATION

5️⃣  Each run = 1 sub-engine OR 1 screen set. Mixed runs = INVALID
6️⃣  NEVER regenerate this prompt. APPEND ONLY if gaps discovered.

⚠️  Antigravity MUST NOT:
    - Invent new template categories outside Meta-defined set
    - Skip HMAC verification in webhook handler
    - Allow free-form messaging in any generated code
    - Reinterpret opt-out rules
    - Mix WABA credentials across tenants

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

║                              🔐 FINAL SEAL                                         ║
║                                                                                    ║
║   THIS PROMPT IS:                                                                  ║
║   ✔  LOCKED                                                                        ║
║   ✔  SEALED                                                                        ║
║   ✔  DETERMINISTIC                                                                 ║
║   ✔  ENTERPRISE SAFE                                                               ║
║   ✔  META POLICY COMPLIANT                                                         ║
║   ✔  GDPR · DPDP · CAN-SPAM ENFORCED                                              ║
║   ✔  MINOR PROTECTED                                                               ║
║   ✔  FULLY ASYNC (Global Async Law Inherited)                                      ║
║   ✔  MULTI-TENANT ISOLATED (per-WABA namespace)                                    ║
║   ✔  PARENT PROMPT INHERITED (NO DUPLICATION)                                      ║
║   ✔  ANTIGRAVITY COMPATIBLE                                                        ║
║                                                                                    ║
║   MODULE        = WHATSAPP_CONNECT                                                 ║
║   ENGINE        = ANTIGRAVITY                                                      ║
║   PLATFORM      = ECOSKILLER                                                       ║
║   VERSION       = 1.0.0                                                            ║
║   CHANGE_POLICY = APPEND_ONLY · ARCHITECT_APPROVAL_REQUIRED                       ║
║                                                                                    ║
║              ANY DEVIATION = STOP EXECUTION                                        ║
